text: In the first scene, I feel a curious stillness and a sense of anticipation as I walk through the angular, softly lit corridor. Its emptiness echoes my footsteps and invites contemplation. In the second scene, surrounded by bold colors and the language of research and progress, I feel invigorated and slightly in awe—reminded of human creativity and the pursuit of understanding. Here, I am both observer and participant, drawn toward knowledge and the future it promises.
